parameters.jsCode:
const body = $('Set Config').first().json.webhookBody;
return [{ json: { success: true, message: 'Task created!', task: { title: body.title, description: body.description || null, due: body.due || null, priority: body.priority || null, status: body.status || 'NEEDS-ACTION', categories: body.categories || [] } } }];

const body = $('Set Config').first().json.webhookBody;
return [{ json: { success: true, message: 'Task updated!', task: { uid: body.taskUid, title: body.title || null, status: body.status || null, priority: body.priority || null } } }];

const body = $('Set Config').first().json.webhookBody;
return [{ json: { success: true, message: 'Task deleted!', taskUid: body.taskUid } }];

const action = $('Set Config').first().json.webhookBody?.action || 'unknown';
return [{ json: { success: false, message: `Invalid action: ${action}. Use fetch, create, update, or delete.` } }];
